notices.title: Real-Time Bell Notifications for All Users
notices.summary: The notification bell now updates in real time across all users — new requests and comments trigger instant alerts with a sound.
notices.description:
Notification delivery has been fully upgraded:
- New requests now ring the bell for all Administration Team and Full Access users on any device
- New comments on any request trigger an instant in-app notification
- Notifications are stored server-side and polled every 30 seconds
- Tab focus triggers an immediate refresh so you never miss an alert
- A subtle two-tone chime plays whenever new notifications arrive

notices.title: Full Access Users Now Receive In-App Notifications
notices.summary: Full Access role users were missing request and comment notifications. This has been fixed.
notices.description:
Fixed a gap in the notification system:
- Root cause: The admin-team endpoint intentionally excluded Full Access users (not a working queue), but in-app notifications were also skipped as a result
- Fix: Full Access users now receive all in-app notifications (new requests, status changes, comments) alongside Administration Team
- Email queue is unchanged — Full Access remains off the email list by design
- No action needed — notifications will appear automatically going forward

notices.title: CC'd Users Now Receive In-App Notifications
notices.summary: Portal users added to the CC list on any request now receive in-app bell notifications for updates and comments.
notices.description:
CC notifications expanded to in-app:
- Any portal user whose email is in the CC list will receive in-app notifications
- Covers both new request submissions and subsequent updates (status changes, comments)
- CC'd users are matched by email against the user directory automatically
- External emails (non-portal users) continue to receive email notifications as before
- The notification bell and sound will trigger for CC'd users just like for admins

notices.title: Travel Requests Auto-CC ap@si-ware.com on Approval
notices.summary: When a travel request moves to In Progress, ap@si-ware.com is automatically added to the CC list.
notices.description:
New automatic CC rule for travel requests:
- Triggered when status changes to In Progress (manually or via manager approval link)
- ap@si-ware.com is added to the request CC list permanently
- All future emails for that request (comments, status updates) will include ap@si-ware.com
- Applies to Travel module only
- No manual action required

notices.title: Event Module Now Live
notices.summary: Event request management now available with full workflow including date, attendees, and location tracking.
notices.description:
The Event module is now fully operational with all features including:
- Event date and time scheduling
- Attendee count tracking
- Internal/External location types
- Full approval workflow
- Comment and attachment support

notices.title: Announcements Page Available
notices.summary: New page to manage system-wide announcements and communications with scheduling and templates.
notices.description:
The Announcements feature enables admins to:
- Create and send company-wide announcements
- Use pre-built templates for common messages
- Schedule announcements for specific times
- Track sent announcements and delivery status
- Manage announcement drafts

notices.title: CC Request Visibility Toggle
notices.summary: Users can now discover requests they're CC'd on across all modules with a convenient toggle switch.
notices.description:
New CC visibility feature allows users to:
- Toggle display of requests where they are CC'd
- See requests from colleagues that require their input
- Access to the same list pages (Shipping, HR, Purchase, Event, Travel, General, Maintenance)
- Separate view from their own submitted requests

notices.title: Travel Module Complete
notices.summary: Complete travel request system with visa and hotel/flight booking types is now available.
notices.description:
The Travel module now includes:
- Multiple trip types (flights, hotels, visas)
- Date and destination tracking
- Budget and cost management
- Approval workflows
- Document attachment support
- Travel history and reporting

notices.title: Fixed Shipping Request ID Duplicates
notices.summary: Resolved issue where concurrent submissions could create duplicate request IDs in shipping module.
notices.description:
A critical issue has been fixed:
- Root cause: Race condition in concurrent request submission
- Solution: Implemented server-side atomic ID generation
- Impact: All new requests now have guaranteed unique IDs
- Status: Deployed and verified across all modules

notices.title: Fixed Attachment Loss on Submit
notices.summary: Resolved attachment loss when localStorage storage limit was exceeded during form submission.
notices.description:
Fixed storage quota issue:
- Root cause: localStorage overflow when saving attachments
- Solution: Implement graceful quota handling and server-side persistence
- Workaround: Attachments now persisted to server immediately
- Users can safely upload large files without data loss
